title: lathyrus alefeldii
intro: Lathyrus alefeldii, also known as the Alefeld's pea or wild pea, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the genus Lathyrus. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis and gout. The health benefits of Lathyrus alefeldii include its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Lathyrus alefeldii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine in various forms.
